Test Title: Page renders 3-column layout (left sidebar / chat / right panel)
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /chat
2. Observe overall page structure
Expected Result: Three distinct columns visible: model list (260px) / chat area (flex) / details panel (280px)

Test Title: Loading state renders ""Loading Chat Hub..."" while models load
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /chat
2. Observe page before models finish loading
Expected Result: Full-page centered text ""Loading Chat Hub..."" is shown while modelsLoading or contentLoading is true

Test Title: Left sidebar has a model search input with correct placeholder
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /chat
2. Observe top of left sidebar
Expected Result: Search input visible with placeholder ""Search 400+ models..."""

Test Title: Left sidebar renders a scrollable list of models
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /chat
2. Scroll the left sidebar model list
Expected Result: List of models renders with overflow scroll; up to 200 models shown

Test Title: Each model row shows icon name lab and optional badge
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /chat
2. Observe any model row in the left sidebar
Expected Result: Row contains: colored icon / model name / lab name / badge (if present)

Test Title: Active model is highlighted with accent border and background
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /chat
2. Observe the currently selected model in the list
Expected Result: Active model row has a 3px left accent-color border and accent-lt background

Test Title: Empty chat state shows model icon heading and description
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /chat
2. Observe center column with no messages
Expected Result: Model icon (large) + ""Chat with {model.name}"" heading + model description paragraph are centered

Test Title: Input textarea renders with correct placeholder
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /chat
2. Observe the bottom input area
Expected Result: Textarea placeholder reads ""Message {activeModel.name}..."""

Test Title: Active model name badge renders inside the input bar
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /chat
2. Observe right side of the input bar
Expected Result: Small chip showing active model name is visible inside the input bar

Test Title: Input toolbar renders all action buttons
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /chat
2. Count icon buttons in the input bar toolbar
Expected Result: Seven icon buttons visible: Sparkles / Mic / Speaker / Waveform / Camera / Video / Paperclip

Test Title: Go send button renders as a circle on the right of the input bar
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /chat
2. Observe the send button
Expected Result: Round ""Go"" button (34×34) is visible at far right of input bar

Test Title: Right panel shows active model card with icon name and org
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /chat
2. Observe top of right sidebar
Expected Result: Model icon (42×42) + model name (Syne font bold) + org label visible in right panel

Test Title: Right panel shows model stats grid (Context Rating Price Reviews)
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /chat
2. Observe model stats section in right panel
Expected Result: 2×2 grid with four stats: Context / Rating / Pricing / Reviews is visible

Test Title: Right panel shows Usage Overview section with sparkline bars
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /chat
2. Observe Usage Overview section in right panel
Expected Result: Usage Overview"" heading + 24 vertical accent bars + Requests / Replies / Files counts visible"

Test Title: Right panel shows Quick Actions section with grouped buttons
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /chat
2. Observe Quick Actions section in right panel
Expected Result: Quick Actions"" heading with grouped action buttons visible; each group has a title"

Test Title: Guest banner is shown for guest users with remaining time
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /chat without logging in
2. Observe top of center column
Expected Result: Banner visible: ""Guest session - {time} remaining"" with ""Save permanently ->"" button

Test Title: Guest banner ""Save permanently"" button links to /auth/signup
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /chat as guest
2. Click "Save permanently ->" button in guest banner
Expected Result: Browser navigates to /auth/signup

Test Title: Guest banner is not visible for authenticated users
Test Steps:
1. Log in
2. Navigate to /chat
3. Observe center column top
Expected Result: No guest banner is rendered for authenticated users

Test Title: Typing a keyword in model search filters the model list
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /chat
2. Type a model name keyword in the search input
Expected Result: Only models whose name or lab includes ""claude"" (case-insensitive) are shown in the list

Test Title: Clearing model search restores the full model list
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /chat
2. Type in search input
3. Clear the input
Expected Result: Full model list is restored after clearing the search field

Test Title: Searching with no matching term shows an empty model list
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /chat
2. Type a term with no matches
Expected Result: Model list renders with no rows

Test Title: Clicking a model in the list sets it as the active model
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /chat
2. Click any non-active model in the left sidebar
Expected Result: Clicked model becomes active: gets accent border + highlighted background; right panel updates to show its details

Test Title: Switching active model updates input textarea placeholder
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /chat
2. Click a different model in the left sidebar
Expected Result: Textarea placeholder updates to ""Message {newModel.name}...""

Test Title: Switching active model updates model badge chip in input bar
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /chat
2. Click a different model
Expected Result: Model name chip in input bar updates to reflect the newly selected model

Test Title: Switching active model updates right panel model details
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /chat
2. Click a different model
Expected Result: Right panel shows new model's icon / name / org / tags / description / stats

Test Title: Go button is disabled (gray) when input is empty and no attachments
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /chat
2. Observe Go button with empty textarea and no attachments
Expected Result: Go button has gray background (var(--border2)) and cursor:default; disabled attribute is set

Test Title: Go button becomes active (accent) when input has text
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /chat
2. Type any text in the textarea
Expected Result: Go button background changes to accent color and becomes clickable

Test Title: User message appears in chat with accent bubble right-aligned
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /chat
2. Type "Hello" and click Go or press Enter
Expected Result: User message bubble appears on the right side with accent background and white text

Test Title: Sending a message clears the input textarea
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /chat
2. Type a message and send it
Expected Result: Input textarea is empty after message is sent

Test Title: Sending a message closes the prompt suggestions panel
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /chat
2. Ensure CPanel is open
3. Send a message
Expected Result: CPanel (prompt suggestions) closes when a message is sent

Test Title: Pressing Enter sends the message
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /chat
2. Type text in textarea
3. Press Enter
Expected Result: Message is sent (same as clicking Go)

Test Title: Pressing Shift+Enter inserts a newline instead of sending
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /chat
2. Type text in textarea
3. Press Shift+Enter
Expected Result: A newline is inserted into the textarea; message is NOT sent

Test Title: Typing indicator (3 dots) appears while awaiting AI response
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /chat
2. Send any message
3. Observe center column immediately after sending
Expected Result: Three animated dots appear in an AI-styled bubble while loading=true

Test Title: Chat scrolls to the bottom automatically after a new message
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /chat
2. Build a long conversation
3. Send a new message
Expected Result: Chat area automatically scrolls to the latest message after each send

Test Title: AI response appears as a left-aligned white bubble
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /chat
2. Send a message and wait for response
Expected Result: AI reply appears on the left with white background border and model icon

Test Title: Message timestamp is shown below each bubble
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /chat
2. Send a message and receive a response
Expected Result: Timestamp (locale time string) visible below user and AI message bubbles

Test Title: API failure shows ""I could not reach the chat service. Please try again.""
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /chat
2. Send a message while the API is unavailable
Expected Result: AI bubble appears with text ""I could not reach the chat service. Please try again.""

Test Title: Expired guest session shows expiry message instead of sending
Test Steps:
1. Manually expire the guest session in localStorage
2. Navigate to /chat
3. Send a message
Expected Result: AI bubble shows ""Guest session expired (3 hours limit). Please sign up to continue chatting."" ; no API call made

Test Title: Sparkles button toggles the prompt suggestions panel
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /chat
2. Click the Sparkles icon button in toolbar
Expected Result: Prompt suggestions panel opens if closed / closes if open

Test Title: CPanel shows category tab buttons
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /chat
2. Ensure CPanel is open
3. Observe tab row
Expected Result: Multiple tab buttons visible (e.g. Use Cases etc.); active tab has accent style

Test Title: Clicking a CPanel tab switches prompt suggestions
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /chat
2. Open CPanel
3. Click a different tab
Expected Result: Prompt chips below update to reflect the selected tab's prompts

Test Title: Clicking a prompt suggestion chip sends it as a message
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /chat
2. Open CPanel
3. Click any prompt chip
Expected Result: Chip text is sent as a message; CPanel closes

Test Title: Sparkles button shows accent highlight when CPanel is open
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /chat
2. Open CPanel
3. Observe sparkles button style
Expected Result: Sparkles button has accent-lt background and accent color when cpanelOpen=true

Test Title: Voice input button turns red and animates when listening
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /chat
2. Click the microphone icon button
Expected Result: Mic button background turns red-tinted and pulses; isListening state = true

Test Title: Clicking mic button again stops voice input
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /chat
2. Click microphone to start
3. Click again to stop
Expected Result: Voice recognition stops; mic button returns to default muted color

Test Title: Voice input with unsupported browser shows alert
Test Steps:
1. In a browser without SpeechRecognition
2. Navigate to /chat
3. Click mic button
Expected Result: Alert ""Voice input not supported in this browser."" is shown

Test Title: TTS speaker button reads the last AI message
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /chat
2. Receive at least one AI message
3. Click the speaker icon button
Expected Result: SpeechSynthesis speaks the last AI message content (up to 500 chars)

Test Title: TTS speaker button shows accent color while speaking
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /chat
2. Receive an AI message
3. Click speaker button
Expected Result: Speaker icon button color changes to accent while isSpeaking=true

Test Title: Clicking speaker again while speaking cancels TTS
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /chat
2. Start TTS
3. Click speaker button again
Expected Result: SpeechSynthesis cancels; isSpeaking becomes false; button returns to muted color

Test Title: Voice recording button shows timer counter while recording
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /chat
2. Click the waveform (voice record) button
3. Observe button while recording
Expected Result: Button expands to show elapsed seconds counter (e.g. ""3s"") and animates

Test Title: Stopping voice recording adds voice attachment chip above input
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /chat
2. Start voice recording
3. Click waveform button again to stop
Expected Result: 🎙 Voice message (Ns)"" chip appears in attachment preview area above input bar"

Test Title: Microphone access denied shows alert
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /chat
2. Click waveform recording button
3. Deny microphone permission
Expected Result: Alert ""Microphone access denied."" is displayed

Test Title: Camera button opens camera modal with video preview
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /chat
2. Click the camera icon button
3. Grant camera permission
Expected Result: Camera modal opens with live video preview and Capture / Cancel buttons

Test Title: Capture button in camera modal adds image attachment
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /chat
2. Open camera modal
3. Click "Capture"
Expected Result: Modal closes; ""🖼 Image: camera-capture.jpg"" chip appears in attachment preview

Test Title: Cancel button in camera modal closes it without attachment
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /chat
2. Open camera modal
3. Click "Cancel"
Expected Result: Modal closes; no attachment is added

Test Title: Camera access denied shows alert and closes modal
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /chat
2. Click camera button
3. Deny camera permission
Expected Result: Alert ""Camera access denied."" shown; camera modal does not open

Test Title: Video recorder button opens video recording modal
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /chat
2. Click the video camera icon button
3. Grant camera/mic permission
Expected Result: Video recorder modal opens with live preview and Start Recording / Cancel buttons

Test Title: Start Recording button shows red REC badge with timer in video modal
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /chat
2. Open video recorder
3. Click "Start Recording"
Expected Result: Red ""REC Xs"" badge appears overlay on the video; timer increments each second

Test Title: Stop & Attach adds video attachment and closes modal
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /chat
2. Start video recording
3. Click "Stop & Attach"
Expected Result: Modal closes; ""🎥 Video message (Ns)"" chip appears in attachment preview

Test Title: Cancel in video recorder modal closes it without attachment
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /chat
2. Open video recorder
3. Click "Cancel" without recording
Expected Result: Modal closes; no attachment is added; camera/mic stream is stopped

Test Title: Camera/mic access denied in video recorder shows alert
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /chat
2. Click video camera button
3. Deny permission
Expected Result: Alert ""Camera/microphone access denied."" shown; modal does not open

Test Title: Paperclip button opens file picker dialog
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /chat
2. Click the paperclip icon button
Expected Result: System file picker dialog opens (multiple files allowed)

Test Title: Selecting an image file adds image attachment chip
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /chat
2. Click paperclip and select an image file
Expected Result: 🖼 Image: photo.jpg"" chip appears in attachment preview area above input bar"

Test Title: Selecting a non-image file adds file attachment chip
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /chat
2. Click paperclip and select a PDF file
Expected Result: 📎 File: report.pdf"" chip appears in attachment preview area"

Test Title: Multiple files can be attached at once
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /chat
2. Click paperclip and select 3 files
Expected Result: Three attachment chips appear in the preview area

Test Title: Clicking x on an attachment chip removes that attachment
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /chat
2. Add an attachment
3. Click the x button on the chip
Expected Result: Chip is removed from the preview; attachment is no longer in the list

Test Title: Go button becomes active when attachments exist (even with empty text)
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /chat
2. Add an attachment without typing any text
Expected Result: Go button turns accent and is clickable even with empty textarea

Test Title: Sending a message clears all attachment chips
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /chat
2. Add an attachment
3. Send the message
Expected Result: Attachment preview area is empty after message is sent

Test Title: Attachment chips are shown with message in chat bubble area
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /chat
2. Attach an image and send it
Expected Result: Image thumbnail renders below the user message bubble in chat

Test Title: Voice attachment renders as audio player in chat
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /chat
2. Record a voice message and send it
Expected Result: Audio element with controls renders below the user message bubble

Test Title: Video attachment renders as inline video player in chat
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /chat
2. Record a video and attach + send
Expected Result: Video element with controls renders below the user message bubble

Test Title: Usage overview Requests counter increments after each send
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /chat
2. Note Requests count
3. Send a message
4. Observe count
Expected Result: Requests count in right panel increments by 1 after each user message sent

Test Title: Usage overview Replies counter increments after each AI response
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /chat
2. Send a message and receive a response
3. Observe Replies count
Expected Result: Replies count in right panel increments by 1 after each AI response received

Test Title: Files counter increments when message with attachment is sent
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /chat
2. Attach a file and send
3. Observe Files count
Expected Result: Files count in right panel increments by the number of attachments sent

Test Title: Usage sparkline bars update to reflect message activity
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /chat
2. Send several messages
3. Observe the 24-bar chart
Expected Result: Bars in the usage chart change height proportionally to reflect message volume in each hour bucket

Test Title: Clicking a Quick Action button sends it as a message
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /chat
2. Click any Quick Action button in the right panel
Expected Result: Action text is sent as a user message; response appears in chat

Test Title: URL param ?model= pre-selects the specified model
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to /chat?model=claude-sonnet46
Expected Result: Model matching the ID is pre-selected as active model on page load

Test Title: URL param ?q= pre-populates input and auto-sends after 500ms
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to /chat?q=Hello
Expected Result: Input is pre-filled with ""Hello"" and message is sent automatically after ~500ms

Test Title: Guest session remaining time is shown correctly in banner
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /chat as guest
2. Read the guest banner time
Expected Result: Banner displays correct remaining time based on session createdAt + 3h expiry window

Test Title: Authenticated user chat messages are sent with userSessionId
Test Steps:
1. Log in
2. Navigate to /chat
3. Send two messages in the same session
Expected Result: Both messages use the same sessionId returned by the first API response; second request includes that sessionId
